items.summary: Fix the game screen so that the arithmetic problem (math question) is visibly rendered during active gameplay. The problem text must appear immediately when the game starts and update each time a new problem is fetched. Ensure the question display element is not hidden, has sufficient contrast against the dark background, and is not conditionally blocked by loading or undefined state. Verify the problem data from the backend hook (useGameState / useQueries generateProblem) is correctly read and passed to the rendered JSX in GameScreen.tsx.
